title: enneapogon scoparius
intro: Enneapogon scoparius is a species of grass native to Australia, commonly known as the Spinifex Grass. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Australian Aboriginal culture, for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and soothing respiratory issues. Enneapogon scoparius can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
